calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Aug-16-2006 Off Calendar

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-16-2006 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES FOR WEDNESDAY, AUG-16-06: MICHAEL R. BRACAMONTES, ESQ. APPEARS FOR PLAINTIFF JOSE R.P. HERRERA, ET AL; LIMITED SCOPE ATTORNEY LAURA CHIERA, ESQ. APPEARS FOR DEFENDANT ERNESTO FLORES AKA ALEJANDRO FLORES, WHO IS ALSO PRESENT THIS DAY.

SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE HELD; THE CASE SETTLES PER STIPULATION PLACED ON THE RECORD, AND NO DOCUMENT IS FILED WITH THE COURT THIS DAY; D-206 TRIAL DATE IS REMOVED; TERMS OF THE SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT INCLUDE THE FOLLOWING: THE PREMISES SHALL BE SURRENDERED BY DEFENDANT ON OCTOBER 1, 2006 BY 5:00 PM FOR RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES LOCATED AT 403 EDINBURGH STREET, APT. #A, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94112 BY THE PLAINTIFF; IF THE DEFENDANT FAILS TO VACATE THE LISTED PREMISES, PLAINTIFF MAY HAVE JUDGMENT FOR PLAINTIFF ENTERED AND MONEY JUDGMENT IN THE AMOUNT OF $15,000 PLUS COSTS MAY ISSUE; THERE IS NO SECURITY DEPOSIT AND LAST MONTH'S RENT DUE AND OWING; DEFENDANT DOES NOT WAIVE ANY RIGHTS WITH THE EXCEPTION OF DAMAGE TO THE PREMISES; EACH PARTY WAIVES ANY UNKNOWN CLAIMS AND VOLUNTARILY AGREES WITH THE SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT; ANY PERSONAL PROPERTY LEFT IS DEEMED ABANDONED AND OF NO VALUE; SECTION CCC 1980-1991 IS COMPLIED WITH; ONE OR ALL DEFENDANTS DECLARE ANY AND ALL MATTERS ARE FULLY DETERMINED IN THIS ACTION AND NO FURTHER COMPLAINT(S) REMAIN; DEFENDANT WAIVES ANY RIGHT TO SEEK FURTHER PROCEEDINGS IN THIS MATTER; PARTIES AGREE THE DEFENDANT IS THE ONLY TENANT AT THE SUBJECT PREMISES AND EACH TERM OF THE STIPULATED SETTLEMENT IS CONSIDERED MATERIAL; BOTH PARTIES ARE BOUND TO ALL TERMS OF THE STIPULATED SETTLEMENT; COUNSEL BRACAMONTES THEN VOIR DIRES HIS CLIENT JENNIFER L. HERRERA ON THE RECORD WHO STATES SHE UNDERSTANDS AND AGREES TO THE TERMS OF THE STIPULATION; DEFENSE LIMITED SCOPE ATTORNEY LAURA CHIERA VOIR DIRES DEFENDANT ERNESTO FLORES ON THE RECORD WHO ALSO IS IN AGREEMENT. JUDGE PRO TEM WILL CHEN; REPORTER DIANA PADILLA; CLERK MARJORIE MANZELLA (D218/206).
